---
title: "Plan and Learning Objectives"
format: html
---

```{r setup, include=FALSE}
library(tidyverse)
```

# Practical 5 - Bioinformatics

::: {.callout-tip .partmenu}

## Practical 5 - Bioinformatics

### @sec-p1_intro_bioconductor

#### Sections
- @sec-ervs
- @sec-bioconductor
- @sec-dataset
- @sec-get_sequence
- @sec-summary_0501

:::

:::{.callout-tip .objectives}
#### Learning objectives
By the end of this part of the practical you will be able to:

* Use some of the tools from the R Bioconductor repository.
* Identify and understand a FASTA file
* Load a set of DNA sequences into R
* Isolate a specific sequence

:::
